title: EU Commission HQ forced to shut down air-conditioning amid heatwave
abstract: The EU Commission HQ had to shut down its air conditioning amid a heatwave, leaving you wondering if the officials are fanning themselves with old-school fans during meetings! Imagine the comical image of well-dressed bureaucrats swatting away at flies in the blistering sun. Come and join us for this "record-breaking" meeting!
abstract_zh: EU总部被迫关空调了，你感受到了吗？这波热浪连欧盟都要认输！想象一下，一群西装革履的官员在酷暑中摇着蒲扇开会的情景，是不是有点搞笑？快来围观这场“史上最热”会议吧！
